PreToolUse.hook: bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo detached); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: On $BRANCH branch. All code changes must be done in a worktree. Create one with: git worktree add ../mtg-scanner-worktrees/<task-description> -b <task-description>" >&2; exit 1; fi'
